I am a 35-year-old woman who has been feeling unfulfilled and restless in my life. I've been feeling like I'm just going through the motions, and I'm not sure what I want to do with my life. I've been feeling a sense of discontent and dissatisfaction with my current situation.

I've been trying to make changes, but I feel like I'm not making progress. I've been trying to find new hobbies and interests, but I'm not sure what I enjoy. I've been feeling like I'm just drifting through life without any real direction or purpose.

I'm feeling a sense of anxiety and uncertainty
